actions.leaf_title: Implement temperature conversion module with affine logic

revised.title: Fix affine rounding edge cases in temperature conversions
revised.content:
Rounding drifts at half-degree boundaries because the affine result is rounded before the offset is applied. Apply offset first, round once at the presentation edge.

Files: unitconv/temperature.py, tests/test_temperature.py

Acceptance criteria:
- 36.65C -> 97.97F (no double rounding)
- boundary table (x.5 inputs) matches the reference values

Test expectations: boundary-table parametrized test in tests/test_temperature.py

actions.rationale: Under-cap failure; revised spec stays inside the strict LeafSpec vocabulary.
